name: Wonderputt
author: Poki
description: Put your golf skills to the test in Wonderputt! Just like in regular golfing, you will have to get the ball into the hole - but there's a twist! As you play, the playing field evolves! Submarines, UFO's and more wild events will show up, changing the playing field and creating new challenges. Can you conquer all the challenges of Wonderputt? How to play Wonderputt? Use the mouse to aim and shoot! Who created Wonderputt? Wonderputt is created by Damp Gnat Games. Play their other games on Poki: Icycle ! How can I play Wonderputt for free? You can play Wonderputt for free on Poki. Can I play Wonderputt on mobile devices and desktop? Wonderputt can be played on your computer only.
